name: replibot
description: Local-first Electron app builder for private apps and widgets.
author: Replibot

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:installer-config && npm run build && set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis
scripts.dist:dir: npm run prepare:installer-config && npm run build && set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --dir
